# Proposition I. Theorem I sample-page extraction

- Primary source: Wikisource 1729, Book I, Section II.
- Existing cached section reused; no build-time network access is required.
- Display slice starts at `PROPOSITION I. THEOREM I.` and stops before `Cor. 1.`.
- Raw and clean sample-page slices are preserved separately.
- Manual comparison against IA Vol.1 scan leaf `102-103` remains pending.
